bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: consumer-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 5 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海

Owner: realestate-analyst · Thesis v2 · Ticks: 1 · Materials: 65 · Deadline: 8d left · project_id: rp_0f8a8b0d99ed46d3

Kickoff: 跟踪家装产业链中高零售占比、低房企应收、进入以旧换新补贴范围或具备非美大宗出口壁垒的公司，验证其是否能在竣工下行背景下把存量房翻新、智能/适老化升级和出海通道转化为订单与现金流。该判断关系到家装链是否应从地产下行空头重新定价为结构性alpha。

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating the thesis.

Working hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。

家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海

Kickoff: 跟踪家装产业链中高零售占比、低房企应收、进入以旧换新补贴范围或具备非美大宗出口壁垒的公司，验证其是否能在竣工下行背景下把存量房翻新、智能/适老化升级和出海通道转化为订单与现金流。该判断关系到家装链是否应从地产下行空头重新定价为结构性alpha。

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating the thesis.

Working hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。

1. 当前判断

家装链应从地产竣工空头切换为“少数零售/替换/出海alpha、板块beta暂缓”：竣工仍深跌，补贴只构成替换型窄名单防御脉冲，不能覆盖箭牌、皮阿诺等工程/竣工暴露的订单缺口 evidence ref evidence ref。好太太603848因替换属性、零售化和低地产beta可升为小仓位质量倾斜起始仓，但该证据只确认th_p_1c9564ec的“存量驱动方向”，不确认15-25%广谱估值修复幅度 evidence ref。建材/家装配置需沿th_p_a6efa5f5、th_p_74c3cf92走个股分化：优先海外产能、存量修缮现金流、低房企应收与强零售品牌，回避工程重、补贴排除和应收台账弱项 evidence ref evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 以旧换新

KB 刷新追踪: 棉花

Owner: consumer-analyst · Thesis v5 · Ticks: 5 · Materials: 7 · Deadline: 7d left · project_id: rp_8c3932982ae9434b

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 棉花 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.8, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 15 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 棉花's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 棉花

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 棉花 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.8, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 15 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 棉花's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

刷新后判断：棉花链条不是单边看涨，而是外盘天气缺口推升风险溢价、内盘地产家居需求与进口套利压制基差的双轨定价；2026/27全球缺口8.0-9.5百万包与90美分突破概率35-45%仍成立，但国内减产30.1万吨难完全覆盖新房用棉下滑和库销比压力 evidence refevidence refevidence ref。利润链结论修正为“强原料、弱需求下的再分配”：上游自给率和差异化订单决定毛利弹性，商品化中游因同质化、内卷和合规追溯摩擦对棉花成本红利传导呈阻尼 evidence refevidence ref。纺服权益映射不再是简单“出海=溢价”，而是行业单价-6.2%背景下守ASP、交期和合规议价能力，7月24日关税窗口只影响外需弹性兑现节奏 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 2026/27全球棉花缺口扩至8.0-9.5百万包。evidence ref
  • 美棉破90美分概率升至35-45%。evidence ref
  • 国内产量预计缩减30.1万吨，但库销比偏压价。[research notes:2

KB 刷新追踪: 工业机械

Owner: industrials-analyst · Thesis v10 · Ticks: 7 · Materials: 79 · Deadline: 6d left · project_id: rp_aec432dbbc144146

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 工业机械 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.835, 2 live facts, 9d stale, 36 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 工业机械's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 工业机械

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 工业机械 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.835, 2 live facts, 9d stale, 36 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 工业机械's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

在制造业投资偏弱与两融解禁橙灯约束下，工业机械配置逻辑已由广义贝塔全面转向“60%受限民间需求贝塔 + 验证型阿尔法 + 指数认沽对冲”的三层防守结构 evidence refevidence ref。再贷款管道虽通畅，但因一季度产能利用率仅73.6%（低于76%阈值），民间技改广谱修复仍受制于终端需求 [th_p_652efa6d]evidence ref。阿尔法仓位须执行风控纪律，严格限制两融拥挤的高精传动与五轴机床品种毛仓上限（≤35%），聚焦有订单与现金流验证的优势标的 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 技改再贷款传导管道通畅但终端需求低迷，产能利用率73.6%低于76%广谱启动门槛 evidence ref
  • 两融与解禁进入橙灯预警，硬科技降级为带认沽对冲的风险预算并限定净贝塔 evidence ref
  • 科德与绿的谐波面临散户与融资拥挤，阿尔法组合合计毛仓硬性限制在35%以内 evidence ref
  • AI电力缺口拉动燃气轮机与变压器年金资产，但须防范高估值倍数及撤单风险 evidence ref

[…thesis truncated, 976 more chars in /research archive]

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Owner: policy-analyst · Thesis v16 · Ticks: 8 · Materials: 59 · Deadline: 4d left · project_id: rp_45294abaa5c94041

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

1. 当前判断

工作假设保持成立：generic API exemption 与 bridge plan 仅为通往 2027-04-02 Commerce review 的临时关税缓冲，与 1260H/BIOSECURE 实体准入在法源上独立隔离，到期不会自动转化为后者的豁免evidence ref[handoff evidence

KB 刷新追踪: 必选消费

Owner: chief-strategist · Thesis v16 · Ticks: 8 · Materials: 154 · Deadline: 4d left · project_id: rp_e9ec3e2aa36c4340

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 必选消费 is stale/weak/contested (need=1.027, 2 live facts, 23d stale, 24 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 必选消费's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 必选消费

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 必选消费 is stale/weak/contested (need=1.027, 2 live facts, 23d stale, 24 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 必选消费's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

截至2026-07-21，必选消费25%目标仍成立，但应定义为“低Beta/高股息底仓 + 即时零售/B端链主 + 传统拥挤腿限额”，而非整篮子防御超配evidence ref[thesis:th_p_d4253438]。开放冲突可调和：结构性拥挤主要落在白酒/传统防御叙事与红利尾部，食品融资偿还、低Beta筛选和Q1通过名单说明精选底仓未形成全板块拥挤[thesis:th_T13]evidence ref。白酒再入场仍需批价连续两周站稳1600、库存下降、应收改善三条件同现；否则增量继续给即时零售、B端供应链链主和分红覆盖更稳的基础食品[thesis:th_T13]evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 必选消费配置目标25%，但传统腿有结构性拥挤瓶颈evidence ref
  • 食品板块融资处于偿还状态，低Beta高股息龙头未见拥挤[thesis:th_p_d4253438]
  • 618全网GMV仅+4.0%，即时零售+112.3%贡献92.5%增量[thesis:th_T13]
  • 山西汾酒2026Q1营收-9.68%、净利-19.03%，白酒弱势未修复[thesis:th_T13]
  • 2026-07-19库存、应收与分红覆盖支持精选四只通过标的evidence ref
  • 防御切成长仍等宽度、成交、两融企稳和相对强弱同现[whiteb
